# novu Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "novu" {
  api_key   = "1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef"
  eu_region = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key for the Novu provider
- `api_url` (String) The API URL for the Novu provider. Overrides eu_region (default:SDK default, US: https://api.novu.co as of provider v1.0.0)
- `eu_region` (Boolean) Whether the provider should use the EU region API (default: false)
